summary: 2026-06-18 07:14:21 PDT — The re-gate, tightened BUG-D1 wording, CHANGELOG instruction, and doctrine files are consistent, but the reordered shell recipe introduces a blocker: its preflight decision does not survive into merge dispatch.

findings.title: Preflight merge strategy is lost before merge dispatch
findings.claim: `autoMerge` is assigned in the separate (a) shell block, then used in (d) after record and gate operations. Shell variables do not survive separate command invocations, so ordinary execution reaches (d) with `autoMerge` empty and incorrectly selects direct merge. If (a) cleared because auto-merge was enabled despite required checks, the line-64 assumption is false; direct merge can fail after the record commit is pushed, recreating the prior BLOCKER.
findings.suggestion: Persist and reload an explicit `auto`/`direct` merge mode across phases, or make (d) select an explicit command from the recorded preflight result. Abort if the mode is missing; never default an unset value to direct merge.
